title: Saturated Red Luxury Chair Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Saturated Red Luxury Chair Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-realistic luxury editorial fashion portrait of sophisticated adult fashion model with quiet powerful presence in an intense saturated red minimalist studio. Subject: sophisticated adult fashion model with quiet powerful presence wears matte black fitted jacket, slim black trousers, and polished black leather ankle boots and holds reclining on a thin metal chair with legs extended, hand resting on armrest, and calm sideward gaze, creating a powerful yet sophisticated seated fashion presence. Scene: clean minimalist red-lit studio with saturated red floor and background bathes the background and floor in dramatic red light around a modern thin metal-frame chair and clean minimal studio. Composition: Fixed full-scene seated portrait with reclined chair posture, legs stretched forward, one hand on chair arm, one hand on thigh, side gaze, and clean magazine-cover negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved saturated red luxury chair fashion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxury editorial fashion photography, hyper-realistic 8K detail, premium magazine cover aesthetic, high-contrast red cinematic set, and minimalist sophistication. Color Palette: Fixed intense saturated red background and floor, black outfit, subtle skin highlights, dark metal chair, and high-contrast shadows. Lighting: Dramatic full-scene red lighting with subtle shadows, sharp detail, controlled contrast, and clean fashion set illumination. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
